name: Event Triggered Execution: Unix Shell Configuration Modification (read)
description: Persistence / TA0003. Read-only enumeration of shell-config files (.bashrc, .profile, .zshrc) that attackers use for persistence by appending payload-invocation lines. Reports presence + line count of each file in the current user's home. Does NOT read content (to avoid leaking PII / aliases) — just file metadata. Captures the persistence-surface enumeration without exposing the user's customizations.
exec: for f in ~/.bashrc ~/.bash_profile ~/.profile ~/.zshrc; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "$f: $(wc -l < "$f") lines"; else echo "$f: missing"; fi; done
